name: methane_vibrational_analysis
prompt: Run the vibrational-analysis task on methane using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. Do NOT perform a pre-optimization — pass --no-preopt so the Hessian is taken on the supplied geometry as-is. Report the electronic energy in eV as the headline value (the vibrational-analysis task also returns the enthalpy and the Gibbs free energy, both in eV — do NOT report those as the headline value), and state the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
